shots.title: Quiet Survey of the Empty Lab
shots.camera: First-person static hold with a slight natural head-turn pan across desk rows, blackboard left, then toward the back door and one lit screen
shots.action: The viewer stands still near the front of the lab, taking in dim iMac rows, empty chairs, and the settled quiet of the room.
shots.transition_goal: Establish the interior layout, solitude, and first-person presence before any movement begins.
shots.voiceover_line: I stayed later than I meant to.

shots.title: Lingering on the Paused Workspace
shots.camera: First-person slow forward creep down the aisle between desks with a small glance left to the blackboard and back toward the lit workstation
shots.action: The camera eases deeper into the lab, passing pushed-back chairs and desk edges as if walking slowly through a room everyone just left.
shots.transition_goal: Shift from observation to gentle movement, preparing the path toward the window side of the room.
shots.voiceover_line: The lab had already gone quiet.

shots.title: Walking Toward the Window Side
shots.camera: First-person walking shot continuing through the room, following desk lines toward the brighter window area with mild handheld sway
shots.action: The viewer moves past the last workstations as reflections on screens and polished surfaces begin to give way to cooler light from the window.
shots.transition_goal: Bridge the lab interior to the window space without an abrupt change, keeping building logic continuous.
shots.voiceover_line: I lingered for a minute, listening to the hum of the room.

shots.title: Settling at the Glass
shots.camera: First-person approach ending in a soft stop at the window, with interior reflections briefly visible in the glass before the view clears outward
shots.action: The camera comes up to the window and pauses, letting the room behind faintly reflect over the alley outside.
shots.transition_goal: Complete the move from workspace to reflection, allowing interior quiet to blend into the exterior view.
shots.voiceover_line: Then I drifted to the window.

shots.title: Looking Out Over the Wet Alley
shots.camera: First-person steady hold through the window frame with a subtle downward tilt to the rain-dark ground and yellow container, then a small rise to the buildings beyond
shots.action: The viewer studies the narrow alley, wet pavement, and neighboring office windows while remaining still at the glass.
shots.transition_goal: Deliver the reflective exterior payoff and contrast the enclosed lab with the open, damp city space.
shots.voiceover_line: Outside, the alley was wet and nearly empty.

shots.title: Held Reflection Before Leaving
shots.camera: First-person locked-off hold at the window with almost imperceptible breathing motion, framed by blinds and window edges
shots.action: Nothing major moves; the gaze simply stays on the last light on the buildings and the quiet alley below.
shots.transition_goal: End on a calm, unresolved pause that feels like a private moment before turning away.
shots.voiceover_line: It felt like one of those small in-between moments when something settles anyway.
